---
title: "Know Before You Go — Code Connect Summit 2026"
---

```{=html}
<!-- NAV -->
<nav class="ccs-nav" aria-label="Site navigation">
  <a class="ccs-nav-logo" href="index.html"><img src="images/Araxi_Group_Synthesis_White.png" alt="Synthesis" style="height:108px;"></a>
  <ul class="ccs-nav-links">
    <li><a href="index.html#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="index.html#hosts">Hosts</a></li>
    <li><a href="index.html#speakers">Speakers</a></li>
    <li><a href="index.html#schedule">Schedule</a></li>
    <li><a href="index.html#contact">Contact</a></li>
    <li><a href="dont-get-got.html" class="ccs-nav-special">Don't Get Got</a></li>
    <li><a href="know-before-you-go.html" class="ccs-nav-special" aria-current="page">Know Before You Go</a></li>
  </ul>
  <a class="ccs-nav-rsvp" href="https://forms.office.com/Pages/ResponsePage.aspx?id=hdvPlCM9SUigZlza2WXM2AYv7RPSF49BsSdfvCGj1WdUMDAyWEJWOUc4S1EyMlJWWDJSWEVMSFc2OC4u">Give Feedback</a>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="ccs-hero">
  <div class="ccs-hero-label">Conference · 2026</div>
  <h1 class="ccs-hero-title">Know Before<br>You Go</h1>
  <p class="ccs-hero-tagline">Everything you need to hit the ground running on June 5th. Read this once, show up ready.</p>
</div>

<!-- LOGISTICS -->
<section class="ccs-section">
  <div class="ccs-section-title">Arrival</div>
  <div class="ccs-kbyg-grid">

    <div class="ccs-kbyg-card">
      <div class="ccs-kbyg-card-icon" aria-hidden="true">🫡</div>
      <div class="ccs-kbyg-card-title">Registration</div>
      <p class="ccs-kbyg-card-body">First stop: <strong>reception</strong>. Pick up your lanyard and name card — you'll write your own name on it. Choose a <strong>fluorescent bangle</strong> (your area of interest), and fill in your <strong>status tag</strong>. Your tag has a QR code linking to the live schedule and speaker info.</p>
      <p class="ccs-kbyg-card-body" style="margin-top:8px;font-size:12px;color:#475569;font-style:italic;">Bangle colours: 🟢 Engineering &amp; Code &nbsp;·&nbsp; 🩷 AI &amp; Data &nbsp;·&nbsp; 🟡 Product &amp; Design &nbsp;·&nbsp; 🔴 Architecture &nbsp;·&nbsp; 🔵 All of the above</p>
    </div>

    <div class="ccs-kbyg-card">
      <div class="ccs-kbyg-card-icon" aria-hidden="true">📍</div>
      <div class="ccs-kbyg-card-title">Finding the Venue</div>
      <p class="ccs-kbyg-card-body">Look for the <strong>Code Connect Summit tunnel</strong> — it leads straight to the Training Rooms. You genuinely will not miss it. The tunnel is an experience in itself. We'll say no more. Just walk through it.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="ccs-kbyg-card">
      <div class="ccs-kbyg-card-icon" aria-hidden="true">☕</div>
      <div class="ccs-kbyg-card-title">Fuel Station</div>
      <p class="ccs-kbyg-card-body">Snacks are right next to the coffee machine and will be stocked all day. Lunch is provided for all in-person attendees. If you have dietary requirements you haven't noted yet, ping <strong>Archie or Kieron on Teams</strong> ASAP.</p>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- ON THE DAY -->
<section class="ccs-section" style="padding-top:0;">
  <div class="ccs-section-title">On the Day</div>
  <div class="ccs-kbyg-grid">

    <div class="ccs-kbyg-card">
      <div class="ccs-kbyg-card-icon" aria-hidden="true">💻</div>
      <div class="ccs-kbyg-card-title">Joining Online</div>
      <p class="ccs-kbyg-card-body">It's a <strong>hybrid event</strong> — Teams link is active from 09:00. Check your calendar invite for the link. If it's missing, ping <strong>Archie or Kieron on Teams</strong>. Online attendees can still enter all raffle draws.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="ccs-kbyg-card">
      <div class="ccs-kbyg-card-icon" aria-hidden="true">📝</div>
      <div class="ccs-kbyg-card-title">Feedback Forms</div>
      <p class="ccs-kbyg-card-body">Fill in a feedback form after each session — it takes 60 seconds and helps us make the next one better. <strong>Each submission is also a raffle entry</strong> for a separate prize draw. Fill them in as you go while it's fresh.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="ccs-kbyg-card">
      <div class="ccs-kbyg-card-icon" aria-hidden="true">🎁</div>
      <div class="ccs-kbyg-card-title">The Raffle(s)</div>
      <p class="ccs-kbyg-card-body">Two ways to win: submit your <strong>lanyard + name tag</strong> for draw #1, and your <strong>feedback forms</strong> for draw #2. Both draws happen at <strong>16:00</strong> during the final session. The silliest outfit prize is also awarded then. Don't leave early.</p>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- CLOSING -->
<section class="ccs-section" style="padding-top:0;">
  <div class="ccs-rsvp-box" style="text-align:left;">
    <p style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:#e2e8f0;margin-bottom:12px;">🚀 Have the Best Time</p>
    <p>Talk to people. That person you've been on calls with for six months but never met? Today's the day. Geek out. Ask questions. Share what you know. Be curious. Be present.</p>
    <p style="margin-top:10px;">And if you spot Kieron in his Yoda outfit — absolutely take photos. In fact, <em>please</em> take photos. Post everything to the <strong>Code Connect Community on Engage</strong>.</p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer class="ccs-footer">
  <div class="ccs-footer-logo"><span aria-hidden="true">⬡</span> synthesis</div>
  Code Connect Summit 2026 &nbsp;·&nbsp; Synthesis Software Technologies
  <div class="ccs-footer-links">
    <a href="dont-get-got.html">Don't Get Got</a>
    &nbsp;·&nbsp;
    <a href="know-before-you-go.html">Know Before You Go</a>
  </div>
</footer>
```
